title: X-tra stuff
description: Just a mod that adds extra stuff.
body:
A Minecraft mod for Forge 1.20.1 with extra stuff to

 

This mod contains the following:

-Crappy textures (first real time),

-A can entity that u can ride,

-Scrap & A Swrap sword,

-Iron nugget ore (Mine with stone or above!),

-A block of dried kelp blocks (i was bored).
